purpose: Implement story-scoped changes on dedicated branches using the approved contract, tests, and knowledge base context.
outputs: Crash-safe hash-chained general trace events and strict-gate integrity verification.
Shared configurable privacy redaction used at persistence and presentation boundaries.
Correlated CLI and HTTP operations with stable redacted error envelopes.
Bounded metrics, liveness, readiness, SLI/SLO signals, and redacted support bundle.
UI ETag conditional reuse, handle-bound reads, human-first EN/IT guidance, tests, and documentation.
validation: decision and assumption changes are recorded
no unauthorized tool or resource use
Negative tests detect trace modification, deletion, reordering, duplication, truncation, evidence drift, crash recovery, and concurrent appends.

Secret and configured-PII canaries never appear in persisted traces, CLI errors, Observatory model/source bodies, metrics, SLO output, UI DOM, or support bundles; legitimate governance identifiers remain readable.
Liveness is shallow, readiness validates model construction, metrics have closed-cardinality labels, SLO insufficient-data is distinct, and support bundle digest is reproducible.
Existing six phases, assessment two-checkpoint journey, workflow instance replay, JSON fields, help, completion, ETag server behavior, and read-only guarantees remain compatible.
npm run check, full npm test, enterprise benchmark, doctor, package dry run, strict story gate, tamper tests, and package-content verification pass.

contextualization.summary: Implement privacy-safe, tamper-evident operational observability while preserving the current lifecycle, workflow-instance chain, ETag backend cache, read-only Observatory behavior, and stable compatibility surfaces.

context_sources.excerpt: # ST-ENT-OBSERVABILITY Plan ## Objective Deliver privacy-safe tamper-evident operational observability for both the CLI and Change Observatory without changing the existing governed lifecycle semantics. ## Scope - In scope - Seal all newly written general trace events into a crash-safe hash chain and verify modification deletion reordering duplication and truncation at the strict gate. - Preserve legacy trace bytes through an explicit prefix anchor; never rewrite historical events in place. - Redact provider credentials sensitive keys URL credentials private keys and configured PII before persistence and again before presentation. - Preserve legitimate governance identifiers such as Git SHA values UUIDs correlation IDs and `AUT-ACT-*` receipts; entropy alone is not a secret decision. - Generate one bounded correlation ID per CLI or HTTP operation and return stable redacted structured errors for expected and unexpected failures. - Add bounded in-memory metrics liveness readiness SLI/SLO evaluation and a redacted support bundle with a reproducible content-integrity digest. - Complete the existing Observatory ETag/single-flight design in the UI client while retaining `Cache-Control no

id ST-ENT-OBSERVABILITY title Tamper-evident privacy-safe operational observability schema_version 0.1.0 status draft phase implementation contract_id contract-ST-ENT-OBSERVABILITY-implementation work_breakdown_id null acceptance Trace events are durably hash-chained and gates detect modification deletion reordering duplication and truncation. Secrets and configured PII are protected before persistence and again before presentation. CLI and Observatory expose correlated structured errors metrics readiness SLO signals and a redacted verifiable support bundle. acceptance_criteria Trace events are durably hash-chained and gates detect modification deletion reordering duplication and truncation. Secrets and configured PII are protected before persistence and again before presentation. CLI and Observatory expose correlated structured errors metrics readiness SLO signals and a redacted verifiable support bundle. requirement_refs content_hash 5dcd3fbc53f37b6c079f926cf60cc5c417601461eb75be85287df32f9da553b7 id REQ-ENTERPRISE-CONTROL-PLANE-001-R2 path .sdlc/requirements/REQ-ENTERPRISE-CONTROL-PLANE-001-R2.json revision 2 autonomy_ceiling bounded-autonomous links requirements REQ-ENTERPRISE-

constraints: Do not rewrite legacy trace bytes; anchor the legacy prefix and seal new events additively.
Redact before persistence and again before presentation; entropy alone cannot classify Git SHA, UUID, correlation, or AUT-ACT receipt identifiers as secrets.
All operational telemetry is bounded and local by default; no external exporter, secret access, production access, install, deploy, or lifecycle semantic change.
Content hashes provide tamper evidence and content integrity, not origin authentication without a trusted external anchor or host signature.

approvals.summary: Approve the exact observability implementation brief under the delegated enterprise program: trace tamper evidence, double-boundary privacy, correlated failures, bounded operational signals, no external export, and preserved compatibility.

scope.principle: An automation approval is valid only under an explicit delegated approval level or configured automation policy recorded in the summary or evidence.
scope.approval_level: Autonomous completion of approved requirement REQ-ENTERPRISE-CONTROL-PLANE-001-R2 through the eight reserved local delivery stories only.
